auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your ZARZOOM account
auth.registerSubtitle: Join thousands of marketers automating their social media
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.signUpSuccessMessage: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
auth.authErrorMessage: Something went wrong during authentication. Please try again.
auth.verifySubtitle: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
auth.verifiedSubtitle: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in to your account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.comingSoon: Coming soon - your social media command center.
dashboard.supportDescription: Need help? Create support tickets or chat with our AI assistant and support team anytime.
dashboard.contentPlannerDescription: Plan and visualise your upcoming social media posts with an easy-to-use calendar.
dashboard.analyticsDescription: View performance insights from all your social media accounts in one place. Track engagement, reach, and growth across your posts.
dashboard.billingDescription: Manage your subscription, view your current plan, and update billing details securely.
dashboard.apiIntegrationsDescription: Manage API keys, connect services, and configure integrations for your workspace.
dashboard.workspacesDescription: Add multiple brands, regions, campaigns — and especially LANGUAGES — all from one ZARZOOM account. E.g. Nike – Global, Nike – French, Nike – Japanese, Reebok – French, Reebok – Japanese. Each one has its own 10 socials, analytics, API, and billing.
dashboard.noWorkspaces: No workspaces found. Click "Add Workspace" to get started.
dashboard.minOneWorkspace: Your account must have at least one workspace. Add another workspace first if you want to remove or replace this one.
dashboard.setupFormPrompt: How should the setup form start for this workspace?
dashboard.newBlankFormDescription: Start from scratch with no previous details
dashboard.deleteWorkspaceWarning: This action is irreversible. The workspace "{name}" and all its data — social accounts, content, analytics, API keys, and billing — will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
dashboard.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace?

connect.pageDescription: Link your social media accounts to enable automated posting, scheduling, and analytics for this workspace.
connect.heading: Connect your accounts
connect.subheading: Link your social media accounts to start posting automatically with ZARZOOM.
connect.popupWaiting: Complete the connection in the popup window
connect.popupWaitingHint: Once you finish, this page will update automatically.
connect.popupFallbackLink: If nothing happens, click here to continue
connect.popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the popup. Use the link below to continue.
connect.successBody: Your social accounts have been linked successfully.
connect.cancelledBody: You closed the window before finishing. Your existing connections are still active.
connect.subscriptionRequired: An active subscription is required to connect social accounts.
connect.returnSuccessPopupHint: You can close this window and return to the app.
connect.returnErrorDefault: The connection could not be verified. Please try again.

uploadPost.connectDescription: Link your social media accounts to start publishing with ZARZOOM.

apiKeys.rotateTitle: Rotate: revoke this key and create a new one

profile.title: Brand Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your brand, goals, plan, and social connections.
profile.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
profile.loadFailed: Failed to load your profile. Please try again.

sections.brandDesc: Your business identity and content preferences.
sections.goalsDesc: What you want to achieve with ZARZOOM.
sections.socialDesc: Manage your connected social media accounts.

autoPublish.label: Auto-publish
autoPublish.help: Allow ZARZOOM to automatically publish content on your behalf.

landing.title: Get Support
landing.subtitle: We're here to help you get the most out of ZARZOOM.
landing.description: Submit a support ticket and our team will respond within 24 hours on business days.

list.title: My Support Tickets
list.subtitle: View and manage your support requests.
list.emptyDescription: You haven't created any support tickets. Click the button below to get started.
list.noMatchFilter: No tickets match the selected status filter.

create.title: Create Support Ticket
create.subtitle: Describe your issue and we'll help you resolve it.

form.subject: Subject
form.subjectHelp: Required. Keep it short and clear.
form.categoryHelp: Optional. Select the category that best fits your issue.
form.priorityHelp: Optional. Let us know how urgent this is.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide detailed information about your issue...
form.descriptionHelp: Required. Include steps to reproduce, error messages, or any other relevant details.
form.attachmentsHelp: Optional. Upload up to 3 screenshots (PNG, JPG, or WebP). Max 5MB each.

success.title: Ticket Created Successfully
success.message: Your support ticket has been created. We'll respond within 24 hours on business days.

error.title: Failed to Create Ticket
error.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

detail.title: Ticket Details
detail.ticketNotFoundMessage: This ticket doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view it.
detail.closeTicketMessage: Are you sure you want to close this ticket? You can optionally provide a reason.
detail.closeTicketPlaceholder: Optional: Why are you closing this ticket?

attachments.fileTypeError: Only PNG, JPG, and WebP files are allowed
attachments.fileSizeError: File size must be less than 5MB
attachments.fileCountError: You can upload up to 3 files per comment

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to access this ticket
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.tooManyFiles: Too many files. Maximum {count} files allowed.
validation.invalidFileType: Invalid file type for {name}. Only PNG, JPG, and WebP files are allowed.
validation.fileTooLarge: File {name} is too large ({size}). Maximum size is 5MB.

onboarding.title: Set Up Your ZARZOOM
onboarding.subtitle: Let's get your social media autopilot configured in a few quick steps.

step1.title: Account Created
step1.subtitle: You're signed in and ready to go.

step2.title: Brand Basics
step2.subtitle: Tell us about your business so we can tailor content to your brand.

businessName.label: Business Name
businessName.help: The name of your business or brand.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Briefly describe what your business does...
description.help: A short summary so our AI understands your brand voice.

websiteUrl.label: Website URL
websiteUrl.help: We'll analyse your site to tailor content.

investigate.error: Could not analyse website. Please fill in details manually.

contentLanguage.label: Content Language
contentLanguage.help: The primary language for your generated content.

articleStyles.label: Article Styles
articleStyles.help: Choose the types of content you'd like ZARZOOM to create.

descriptions.let_zarzoom_decide: Let our AI choose the best format for your content
descriptions.ultimate_guides_pillar: Long-form, authoritative, covers a whole topic
descriptions.best_top_forecasts: Best Tools for X, Top Trends in 202X
descriptions.problem_solution_posts: Identify a pain point then answer it
descriptions.resource_roundups: Best Articles, Tools, Links on a topic
descriptions.historical_timeline: Look back over development or evolution

styleLinks.label: Style Reference Links
styleLinks.help: Add up to 3 links to articles whose style you'd like to emulate.

brandColor.label: Brand Colour
brandColor.help: Your primary brand colour for generated visuals.

step3.title: Goals & Growth
step3.subtitle: What do you want to achieve with ZARZOOM?

goals.label: Select Your Goals
goals.help: Choose one or more goals. We'll tailor your strategy accordingly.

websiteUrl.label: Website or Landing Page URL
websiteUrl.help: Required when your goals include website traffic or lead generation.

productUrl.label: Product or Sales Page URL
productUrl.help: Required when your goals include product promotion or sales.

step4.title: Choose Your Plan
step4.subtitle: Start with a plan that matches your growth ambitions.

advanced.aiGeneration: Premium AI with custom brand voice

planDescriptions.basic: Perfect for getting started with social media automation.
planDescriptions.pro: For growing businesses that need more power and insights.
planDescriptions.advanced: Unlimited everything for teams and agencies.

step5.title: Connect & Launch
step5.subtitle: Connect your social accounts and set your preferences.

approval.label: Content Approval
approval.help: Choose how ZARZOOM publishes your content.
approval.autoHelp: ZARZOOM publishes content automatically on schedule.
approval.manualHelp: Review and approve each post before it goes live.

notes.label: Additional Notes
notes.placeholder: Anything else you'd like us to know about your brand or content preferences...
notes.help: Optional notes for our AI to consider.

modal.title: Connect Social Accounts
modal.errorGeneric: Could not load the social connector. Please try again later.
modal.errorNoUrl: No connect URL was returned. Please try again.
modal.demoDescription: The social connector is not yet configured for this environment. Your social account connections will be available once the provider is set up by an administrator.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load your onboarding data. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
errors.completeFailed: Could not complete onboarding. Please check all required fields.

banner.skipped: You skipped setup. Complete it to unlock all features.
banner.inProgress: Your setup is incomplete. Finish it to get started.

gate.title: Setup Required
gate.description: Complete your onboarding setup to unlock this feature. It only takes a few minutes.

validation.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)

page.title: Billing & Subscription
page.subtitle: Review your workspace plan, billing status, and manage subscription settings.

currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.subtitle: Details for the subscription attached to this workspace.
currentPlan.priceUnknown: Pricing not yet configured for this workspace.
currentPlan.featuresPlaceholder: Plan features will appear here once a subscription is active.

actions.title: Billing Actions
actions.subtitle: Manage your plan and subscription for this workspace only.

noSubscription.title: No subscription active for this workspace
noSubscription.body: Choose a plan to unlock automated content, analytics, and social connections for the selected workspace.

history.title: Billing History
history.subtitle: Invoices and payments for this workspace will appear here.
history.emptyBody: Once you subscribe to a plan, invoices and payment receipts will appear in this section.

errors.portalOpenFailed: We couldn't open the billing portal. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while opening the billing portal. Please try again.

cancellation.title: Subscription Management
cancellation.subtitle: Manage or cancel your workspace subscription.
cancellation.cancelDescription: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period. After that, your workspace will lose access to paid features.
cancellation.cancelConfirmNote: You'll be redirected to our secure billing portal to confirm cancellation.
cancellation.pendingDescription: Your subscription is set to cancel. You'll continue to have full access until {date}.
cancellation.reactivateDescription: Changed your mind? Reactivate to keep your current plan.
cancellation.reactivateNote: You'll be redirected to our secure billing portal to reactivate.
cancellation.canceledDescription: This workspace no longer has an active subscription.

billing.selectCurrencyHelp: Choose your preferred currency for pricing.
billing.discountPartnershipDescription: Allow ZARZOOM to post promotional content to your feed (max {maxFrequency}) and receive a {percent}% discount on your subscription. You retain full control and can disable this anytime.
billing.partnerDiscountSubheading: Save 50%. We may publish up to 1 small ZARZOOM promo per day (max 3–7 weekly) — never on your own posts.

admin.title: Billing Management
admin.subtitle: Manage subscription plans, pricing, and billing settings
admin.newPlanDesc: Create a new subscription plan with pricing

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your growth. Start with a free trial, upgrade anytime.

page.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
page.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
page.footer: All prices exclude VAT where applicable. Cancel or change your plan at any time.
page.contactCta: Questions? Contact us and we'll help you find the right plan.
page.contactCtaSuffix: and we'll help you find the right plan.

fallback.title: Pricing Temporarily Unavailable
fallback.message: We're currently updating our pricing plans. Please check back shortly or contact support for assistance.

basic.description: Essential features to launch your social media presence with AI-powered content creation and scheduling.

pro.description: Advanced features and analytics to scale your social media strategy with intelligent automation.

advanced.description: Enterprise-grade features with unlimited content, custom branding, and dedicated support for maximum impact.
bullets: Premium AI with custom brand voice
